content: User prefers high-quality wireless headphones with active noise cancellation and premium cordless electronics.
User is a senior software engineer who listens to classical music while coding and is looking for a portable e-reader.
User is interested in computer algorithms, database architecture, and distributed system books.
User clicked on Introduction to Algorithms and Designing Data-Intensive Applications books twice in the last session.
User prefers cotton clothing, workout gear, and high-performance running sneakers.
User regularly trains for athletic events and runs outdoor marathons.
User likes physical book reading on glare-free screens and lightweight literature.
User prefers reading outdoors during daytime hours.
